programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Colby and Helmeppo train day and night to prove they’re tough enough to be Marines. A violent showdown with Vice-Admiral Garp will determine if they’re worth their salt.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy’s gang is running low on supplies, so they stop at Little Garden to find something to eat. Unfortunately for them, it might end up the other way around.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Not only are there dinosaurs running wild on the island of Little Garden, but the Straw Hats soon find themselves in the middle of a gargantuan grudge match.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp and Luffy are fascinated by the endless battle waged between Dorry and Broggy; however, fascination turns to outrage when Monkey catches a whiff of treachery.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy’s blood boils for revenge against the assassins who sabotaged Dorry and Broggy’s battle, but he’s currently trapped between a rock and a hard place.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Luffy struggles to free himself, his friends fall into the hands of Baroque Works. Though the odds are against them, the Straw Hats will never give up!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami, Zorro, and the Princess are in danger of becoming exhibits in a fiendish artist’s collection, and only Luffy can save them. But he’s busy having a cup of tea.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With his friends about to be permanently entombed in wax, Usopp is provided with the perfect opportunity to be brave and make his father proud.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After narrowly avoiding death, Luffy’s crew and the Princess set sail for Alabasta, but something large and dangerous looms in their path.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami comes down with a terrible fever and the Straw Hats don’t know what to do. Looks like the Grand Line might claim another victim.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats continue their quest to find a doctor for Nami. Along the way, they deal with a ravenous invader and get a chilly reception from local islanders.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Sanji make a bold trek up a snow-covered mountain in search of a witch who might hold the key to curing Nami.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ferocious, giant, snow rabbits slow Luffy and Sanji’s progress up the mountain. Meanwhile, the former king Wapol returns to the town he abandoned.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami hovers near death while Luffy and Sanji fend off the abominable rabbits. Back at the village, Dalton leads a revolt against the dastardly Wapol.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: An unlikely source acts as a roadblock to give Luffy some climbing room, and Zorro emerges from a snow bank cold, cranky, and ready to rumble

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After a long journey up the mountain, Nami finally receives much-needed medical attention, but Sanji and Luffy are more interested in eating the doctor!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy recruits Tony Tony Chopper to join the Straw Hat crew as the ship’s doctor.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper’s first friend was a quack doctor who couldn’t cure a cold, but the old man still managed to teach the little reindeer how to care for people.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy unleashes the full force of his Gum Gum furry on Wapol, and Chopper is amazed by the rubberman’s fierce devotion to the pirate flag.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When Wapol orders his goons to attack the Straw Hats, Chopper shows off a little something he calls the Rumble Ball!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Wapol attacks Nami in her weakened condition, but Monkey B. Luffy is quick to step in and even the odds.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After an explosive battle with Wapol, Luffy begins the tiring process of convincing Chopper to join his pirate gang.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper sets sail for Alabasta with his new friends, and Dalton thinks back to his first meeting with Princess Vivi.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats rescue a man of many faces as they approach Alabasta. Sure, he’s good for a laugh, but they may regret pulling him out of the drink.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats arrive in Alabasta with precious little time to stop the rebellion. Sanji and Chopper are sent to gather supplies for a dangerous trip across the desert.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Captain Smoker has Luffy in his grasp until a fiery stranger creates a diversion, giving the Straw Hats a chance to make a break for it.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ace and Luffy’s happy reunion is crudely interrupted by the Billions of Baroque Works. They may be outnumbered, but these brothers are no ordinary pirates!

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Descent
programme.desc: Johnny struggles to rescue four teens trapped in a collapsing mine, all the while reliving - and in some way trying to redeem - sins from his family's past.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Ascent
programme.desc: In the continuation of the episode "Descent," an unexpected incident leads Johnny to a new understanding of Walt.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: The Outsider
programme.desc: Johnny takes on a major corporation to prevent the mass marketing of a drug he foresees will cause terrible birth defects years down the line.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Pablo and Kelly notice something ominous between the Book and Brujo's pendant. Ash promises to visit Lem, but Fisher shows up for an almighty showdown with her former boss.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash, Pablo and Kelly, now joined by Fisher, arrive at the survivalist camp in the midst of chaos and must go to extreme measures to escape. Meanwhile, more is revealed of Ruby's mission.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash attempts to bury the book to end the Evil, but first he must contend with other, more physical things from his past. Fisher faces a horrific change in Ash.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash battles someone all too familiar, and later hears a message from the Necronomicon. Meanwhile, the deadliest Deadite attacks.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: In a monumental, last-ditch attempt to rid the world of the Evil, Ash wages war against a Dark One. As the battle rages on, Ash is offered a deal that could completely change his life.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus and Tesla investigate a former Praxian stronghold and unintentionally stumble on vampiric secrets.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Discover Magnus's role in a turning point of World War II history.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: A colleague vanishes amid unexplained disappearances in Normandy, France, where Magnus and her team run into a military blockade during their investigation.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Helen and Will find themselves in an alternate reality, living as suburban neighbors, who experience unsettling dreams that disrupt their new careers.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: An ailing Maiya (Montse Viader) must "merge" with her dimensional double, Isabel (Montse Viader), before the Taelons use her to crack the Liberation movement, which has lost its leader, Jonathan Doors (David Hemblen), to the U.S. presidential race.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Dr. Belman's (Majel Barrett) daughter Joyce (Polly Shannon) becomes part of a tainted Taelon bioengineering experiment, which turns her into a lethal alien hybrid bent on destroying Earth and the Companions.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam (Robert Leeshock) attempts to rescue Lili (Lisa Howard) who is being held hostage by an escaped Jaridian (Andrew Jackson) aboard an abandoned Kimeran vessel.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When a young mother is found dead in a field after a night out, police scour security video to retrace a suspect's steps; the discovery of a second crime scene leads to an arrest, before high-tech forensics reveal a truth no one expected.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A cat-loving and recently divorced young woman dipping her toes back in the dating game is beaten and strangled in a brutal and unusual way; investigators dive into the murky world of online dating to hunt a killer who could be ready to strike again.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A wealthy entrepreneur is shot in his home; there are many suspects but with only suspicion to go on, it takes investigators over seven years to nab his killer.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: Lust and greed are at the core of the case of a wife and mother who is found dead in her pool; investigators are quick to uncover a web of affairs, lies and fraud that lead them to her killer.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mother is found dead in a hotel stairwell and detectives quickly uncover that she had a secret life that may have led to her demise.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: When a police officer goes missing, it becomes apparent he is the victim of a jealous wrath.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: Three members of a wealthy family are gunned down in their own home; with little evidence to go on, investigators embark on a multi-year surveillance operation to see if they can prove their instincts are correct.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A beloved entrepreneur is murdered in his office; a secret double life is quickly revealed, and despite mountains of suspicion, lies and motives, his killer is not who one would assume.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A man is found dead in the shower, and police have only two suspects, but to figure out who killed him and why, is not as cut and dry as it may seem.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A teenage girl is found beaten to death at the neighborhood pool, launching her father on a mission to catch her killer that ultimately changes crime fighting forever.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A brutal attack leaves witness to a murder; but when the police find the killer, it turns out the intended victim, and the motive, were not what anyone imagined.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: When a prominent attorney is found savagely stabbed to death in her office, investigators find themselves with a long list of suspects from violent felons to lesbian love triangles; in the end, they find a killer as cold as they come.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: What originally looks like a heart attack turns out to be a calculated execution; soon, detectives unravel a murder plot that hits a little too close to home.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: After a woman is found shot dead, with her 9-month-old daughter in the next room, detectives uncover a web of late-night encounters, secret lovers and seething jealousy.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A woman is found stabbed to death in her apartment; with a long list of admirers, investigators uncover secret obsessions leading to a sadistic killer suspected by no one.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mother is strangled to death in the middle of a Hawaiian paradise; investigators quickly focus in on two suspects, but nothing comes easy as they spend more than a decade striving to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: It's Adventure Bay Western Days, when a herd of cows escape from a train at the railway station!/When their friend Alex decides he wants to be a member of the PAW Patrol the PUPS and Ryder let him come along for the ride.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When Cap'n Turbot's boat runs aground, Ryder, Zuma, Skye, and Rocky must team up to save it before it sinks!/The PAW Patrol must pick all Farmer Yumi's fruit before an early snowstorm comes! But how can Chase help?

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder, Chase, and Rubble hatch a plan to help sea turtle hatchlings safely cross the road to get to the beach!/There's a beached baby whale in Adventure Bay! Can the Paw Patrol work together to reunite it with its mother?

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol rescue a lost kitty from the bay, but who will save them from all the mayhem she causes?/Ryder, Rubble, and Rocky call in Chase to help them free Katie and Cali's train from a rockslide!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol must work quickly to fix the tracks and remove a train car at the Adventure Bay Train Station, before the next train comes./Ryder and the PAW Patrol battle the clock to fix the lighthouse.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Marshal gets a new BFF when a gosling he names "Fuzzy" takes a liking to him. /When Mayor Goodway accidentally takes off in a hot air balloon, Ryder and the Paw Patrol must make a dramatic rescue to save her and win the race!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol need to rescue Alex on Jakes mountain./The pups find strange footprints in the snow on the mountain outside Adventure Bay. Everyone thinks it's a "snow monster" and it's scaring the skiers away.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder gets a call from the Circus ringmaster - Ellie the baby elephant has escaped from the circus train! /Mayor Goodway's purse chicken "Chickaletta" has gone missing. Ryder and the Paw Patrol search Adventure bay.

programme.title: PAW Patrol

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four Teams mix it up in Brazil where Racers cry out in pain during a hairy situation as this season comes down to a race to the finish line when one Team will be crowned the winners and receive the 1 million dollar prize.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Emmy Award-winning The Amazing Race sets off for a new global adventure as Teams depart for Taipei, Taiwan. Plus, one team's position in the game is put in serious jeopardy when they lose their passport less than an hour into the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: When Racers discover that for the first time in THE AMAZING RACE history there is a double elimination, they are forced to step up their game. However, costly mistakes jeopardize multiple teams' chances at staying in the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One Team is stranded in Indonesia as they watch their competition race by, and two Teams join forces to push through a mind-numbing mental challenge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams struggle with an underwater challenge which threatens their positions in the game, and one team’s love for the outdoors comes in handy during a tough climbing challenge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Fearing they have broken the rules, one team takes a risk that could cost them the Race. Meanwhile, an unwanted speed bump turns into a dream excursion for Liz and Marie, but will it push them even farther back.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: After falling to the back of the pack, a disheartened racer is encouraged by the spirit of the local workers, and it’s an intense foot race to the first-ever Pit Stop in Malawi.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Malawi where a puzzling patriotic Roadblock causes one team to fall behind. Also, with a Double U-Turn on the line, teams must choose whether to sabotage their fellow Racers for a chance at first place.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Race travels to Copenhagen for the first time, where one Racer learns the meaning of two left feet and a double U-turn jeopardizes team positions in the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: After a potentially game-changing error, one team hopes for a lucky break, and donning only a Speedo for their Detour task, Racers get in touch with their inner exhibitionists.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers put the pedal to the metal and shift into high gear when they take a thrilling test drive, and results are far from sweet when teams also try to recreate classic Belgian waffles.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams make their way to Panama City, where they come face-to-face with their fears as they take in astonishing views of the city skyline.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: After racing through 4 continents, 20 cities and nearly 40,000 miles, the final three teams race to Atlanta, Ga., where a smooth landing evades one team as their competition soars.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: As 11 Teams depart Santa Barbara, Calif. for Santa Barbara, Argentina, one team struggles to keep their nerves at bay. Meanwhile, Teams quickly discover winning $1 million may be tougher than expected when they find themselves skydiving at 10,000 feet.

programme.title: Hardwood Classics
programme.desc: John Stockton delivers a career-best 28 AST, Karl Malone adds 31 PTS, and Jazz roll past the Spurs. From Jan. 15, 1991.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson Investigation: Insurance torchings, mob burnouts and arson murders: these crimes are designed to take all clues with them. But a solid case can be built from a heap of ashes.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Youths
programme.desc: A young girl playing in her yard in Spokane, Washington suddenly vanishes. In St. Louis another girl leaves to visit a friend. She never arrives.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Tool marking: A tool used to commit a crime can often be the same tool used to solve it. The pattern a machine leaves on an item, the unusual way a tool crimps a wire, and even something as innocuous as the shape of a wood chip can lead to a killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people murder for love. But these killers did it for the money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every clue pay off.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people will let nothing stand between them and their goals. In their tortured minds, raw desire replaces all reason, and homicide becomes a convenient means to an end.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims – And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder – These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A good coroner provides what's necessary to solve a crime. A bad one can spoil an otherwise rock-solid case. Cyril Wecht and Henry Lee, two of the country's most respected coroners, share their cases and insights into crime solving.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes the scales of justice are balanced by just a few milligrams of evidence – a couple of fibers, a tooth filling, or a smudge on a piece of tape. The biggest cases are often solved by the smallest clues.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a victim is gunned down at point-blank range, police often assume that a friend or acquaintance is to blame.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.desc: In a ghost town, Lucas, Mark and Micah tangle with the Newman family and learn the secret of the town's 20-year-old mystery of a lost gold mine.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Blinded in an explosion, Lucas fights despair as he prepares for a meeting with a gun-toting enemy.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A deranged ex-prisoner of war, cruelly abused in a Northern army prison, captures Lucas, locks him in a cage and vows to make him suffer for his part in the Civil War.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A traveling salesman can't talk his way out of an assault charge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is threatened with hanging by a lynch party when some horses he has purchased in a neighboring town turn out to be stolen.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A janitor-turned-gunfighter's reputation hangs on one lucky shot and a lot of gall. The handyman finds himself in trouble when he accidentally kills another gunfighter.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to get help when he is shot after witnessing a murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After being foreman of a jury that convicted an Apache, Lucas is marked for death. Now, he must discover who is behind the curse.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas allows some snowed-in stagecoach passengers to stay with him until the roads are passable. Trouble brews when the whiskey salesman and gunfighter fall for the same woman.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Two pranksters write away for a mail-order bride, using Lucas's name.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas recognizes Dr. Battle as an ex-gunslinger with whom he once fought. He helps with a dying man, but Lucas and the doctor have unresolved anger.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A Chinese man and his son fight prejudice as they try to open a laundry in North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Lucas and Mark are traveling across the Mexican desert they encounter a trio of Mexican bandits who demand payment to cross "their" desert.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark takes a job as a stable boy against his father's wishes.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Milly are held hostage in her general store when two gunmen attempt a daring robbery.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark goes to work for Will Temple, a badly scarred, very mysterious rancher.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Corey Hazlett insists he's innocent of murder, despite Lucas's eyewitness testimony.

programme.desc: Lucas tries to dissuade a latter-day knight from rushing into battle.

programme.desc: Abe Lincoln's claim that he's the Great Emancipator amuses everyone except Matt Yordy.

programme.desc: Stubborn Grandpa Fogarty is Lucas's main roadblock as he tries to get young Woody Fogarty to attend school.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A bored, wealthy businessman gets a chance to go back in time and start over, armed with all the knowledge he's acquired.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man named Benteen leads a colony of Americans stranded on a desert planet for 30 years.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A young couple book passage on a trans-Atlantic cruise, hoping to salvage their marriage.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An untalented would-be writer's career takes off when the ghost of William Shakespeare writes his script.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An alcoholic bookie regrets that he wasn't a better father to his son, Pip, critically wounded in South Vietnam. A visit to an amusement park gives them both a second chance.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Boxing robot "Battling Maxo" breaks down before the scheduled bout, forcing his manager to take its place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Mr. Wilson believes he sees a gremlin on the wing of the commercial aircraft he is taking back home... from the sanitarium, where he has been committed for six months after a mental breakdown during a similar flight.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Patrick Thomas McNulty, a long-winded and self-absorbed know-it-all, is given a fantastic device which brings literal meaning to the expression "stop the world; I want to get off."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A dejected jockey wants to be tall.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Erich is displeased when his wife buys an expensive doll for his step-daughter. He becomes even more displeased when the doll tells him it doesn't like him!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A mysterious guardian helps a tiny community survive after the Bomb destroys much of the Earth.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Barbara accidentally causes her cruel Uncle Simon's death. His will stipulates that she must care for his latest invention - a robot. The robot begins to take on Uncle Simon's traits.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The lone survivors of two annihilated worlds are stranded on a distant planet.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three National Guardsmen explore the site of Custer's Last Stand and encounter mysterious phenomenon that hint at the original battle occurring just out of sight.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Trying to keep up with his younger wife, Harmon convinces his brother to inject him with an experimental youth serum.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Bunny receives a ring from her fan club in her home town. In the ring she sees the faces of people from her hometown telling her she's needed there so she returns home.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Driving home one rainy evening, Oliver Pope accidentally hits a boy on a bicycle. Pope flees the scene, determined to hide his guilt, but his car has other ideas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Before leaving on his mission, an astronaut meets a woman. They fall in love...

programme.desc: The Reapers defend Meridian from an incoming herd; Pope suspects Maggie is behind the attack, while Daryl treads carefully; Alexandrians scramble to protect themselves when a violent storm leaves them vulnerable to walkers.

programme.desc: While searching for a missing Alexandrian, Rick and his group encounter a mysterious collective, its inhabitants unlike any they have come across.

programme.desc: An Alexandrian discovers they must navigate the mysterious, confusing and terrifying world within the Saviors' compound.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group scavenges for supplies; back in Alexandria, someone must make a morally challenging decision.

programme.desc: Things do not go as planned when a group of Kingdommers delivers goods to the Saviors during a routine supply drop-off.

programme.desc: The Saviors visit the Hilltop unexpectedly, surprising everyone, with plans of taking more than supplies.

programme.desc: A group of Alexandrians embarks on a journey; one member of the group must make a heartbreaking decision.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and his group, along with the Kingdom and Hilltop, have banded together to bring the fight to Negan and the Saviors.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The plan involving Alexandrians, Kingdommers and Hilltoppers unfolds; as Rick continues to fight, he encounters a familiar face.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Conflict with the Saviors leads to unintended consequences for the Hilltop, the Kingdom, and Alexandria; morality proves tricky in wartime.

programme.desc: A new weapon in the Savior arsenal proves to be a giant hurdle as fighting continues between Rick's forces and those of the Saviors.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo debe averiguar cómo salir de una situación peligrosa.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Tras el encuentro de Daryl y Lydia con Alpha, los habitantes de las comunidades enfrentadas a los Susurradores, que se aproximan a la Cumbre, tienen dos opciones: huir o pelear. Entretanto, surgen problemas entre Eugene y Stephanie.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Michonne lleva a Virgil de regreso a su misteriosa isla para reunirse con su familia. A cambio, Virgil promete armas que podrían cambiar el rumbo de la Guerra de los Susurradores.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Michonne devuelve a Virgil a la isla misteriosa de la que proviene para que se reencuentre con su familia. A cambio, Virgil promete que le entregará un arsenal que cambiará el rumbo de la guerra contra los Susurradores.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Todos, héroes y villanos, se adaptan a las consecuencias del devastador incendio que destruyó la comunidad. Eugene encabeza a un grupo que parte en busca de Stephanie, guiados por la esperanza de encontrar otra civilización.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Princess asusta a los caballos de Eugene, Yumiko y Ezekiel, pero les promete otro medio de transporte. Mientras, Beta, en estado de delirio psicótico, guía a la horda de zombis hacia Alexandria para destruirlo todo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los seguidores de Beta se acercan a las puertas, y parte del grupo se impregna de sangre de zombi para intentar escapar entre la multitud de caminantes y regresar con ayuda. Sin embargo, los susurradores se mueven con cuchillos entre los zombis.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie regresa, para consternación de Negan. Los desafíos que superó desde su partida han hecho que se vuelva difícil sobrevivir para ella y su hijo. Por otro lado, Daryl y Maggie luchan inesperadamente contra una amenaza invisible y desconocida.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Carol encuentran una vieja cabaña que provoca que Daryl recuerde sus años alejado del grupo después de que Rick desapareció. Además, revive el doloroso recuerdo de encontrarse con un sobreviviente y los eventos tóxicos con Dog.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie, Gabriel y Aaron buscan comida y suministros para llevarlos de regreso a Alexandria, utilizando el mapa de Maggie. En su búsqueda de una ubicación más, encuentran un escondite, pero la fe se rompe y el optimismo se resquebraja.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene, Ezekiel, Yumiko y Princess son capturados y separados por los misteriosos soldados que los rodeaban en la estación ferroviaria. Princess lucha con los recuerdos de su traumático pasado y planea escapar.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Carol toman caminos separados. Ella regresa a Alexandria, mientras él se adentra en los bosques. A partir de este momento, cado uno deberá usar sus habilidades de supervivencia.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie vuelve a Alexandria mientras Carol lleva a Negan a un viaje para minimizar la tensión en aumento. Negan reflexiona sobre su difunta esposa Lucille.

programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon battle bandits and counter-revolutionaries to recover a prize stallion.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Richard works on plumbing at the Elliotborough house while Kevin meets a kitchen designer. The porch gets assessed. A floor goes down at the single house. Tommy and Mark snake wires through a wall.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The old piazza columns get restored. The iron gate is made by blacksmith students at a local college. Lights are selected for an old house. New siding mixes with old to meet historic district codes.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Charleston boasts a colorful housing stock. Judith decides on a siding color for the Elliotborough project. Kevin meets her and a design expert in a neighborhood famous for house colors, Rainbow Row.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The pergola goes up. Ross looks at smart home technology. A local craftsman puts the finishing touches on a dining table. Richard checks out the HVAC plan while repointing starts on the fireplaces.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The iron gate is fitted at the Charleston Single House. Kevin, Tom, and Richard tour the renovations. Richard visits the Elliotborough project for updates. The completion of the project is celebrated.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A year after California’s worst wildfire, the people of Paradise are still clearing the devastation. About 90% of the homes were lost. Kevin, Tom, and Richard meet families determined to rebuild.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The homeowner fabricates a stone hearth. Richard learns about automatic sprinkler systems. Kevin sees a simulator that shows how the Camp Fire spread. Tom inspects a vent designed to resist embers.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Luke and Crystal move in. Kevin visits a fire test lab. Jose and Anna’s house gets roof shingles. Mark installs a stone veneer. Kevin tours farms. Jenn meets an architect who designed a town memorial.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Paradise residents discuss rebuilding. Tom inspects engineered siding. Richard looks at a backup battery. A former fire chief discusses preparation. At the Memorial, heroes and survivors are honored.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Homeowners put the history back into their 1890s Shingle-style home. They’ll restore the home’s original beauty and update it for modern living.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom helps a homeowner seal out drafts by installing weather-stripping. Kevin discusses ways to monitor and save electricity. Richard helps a homeowner determine a new heating system’s proper size.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Kevin build a basic picnic table using common framing lumber, the guys ask: "What is it?" and Richard helps a homeowner install a new utility sink in a basement laundry area.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger learn about Harvard’s new organic lawn-care program. Kevin makes "compost tea.”, the guys ask: "What is it?" and Tom prevents attic mildew by re-routing an improperly vented bathroom fan.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger installs stone veneer over an ugly concrete retaining wall, the guys ask: "What is it?" and Richard retrofits dampers in forced-air HVAC ducts. Tom shares a tip about foam-can insulating.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Kevin build and install new laminate kitchen countertops, the guys ask:"What is it?" and Roger helps a homeowner create a clean border between a garden bed and a lawn using steel edging.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger improves a concrete retaining wall with wooden lattice and climbing vines, the guys ask, "What is it?" and Tom shows how to flash a newly-installed window. Richard quiets a PVC plumbing vent.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard repairs a broken water softener, the guys ask "What is it?" and Roger helps a homeowner repair and prevent deer damage to his evergreen trees. Tom shares a tip on reducing sanding dust.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom helps dress up a fireplace by installing a new mantle and marble hearth, the guys ask "What is it?" and Richard shows Kevin a few ways to improve the appearance of old baseboard heaters.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Marvin Hagler vs John Mugabi
programme.desc: On March 10th, 1986 Marvin Hagler and John Mugabi fought at the Caesars Palace Outdoor Arena in Las Vegas for IBF, WBA and WBC world middleweight titles while Mugabi was ranked number 1 by all three bodies the fight ended in a victory for Hagler.

programme.title: Michael Carbajal vs Humberto Gonzalez 1
programme.desc: On March 13th, 1993, Michael Carbajal fought Humberto Gonzalez for the WBC and IBF Light Flyweight Titles in Las Vegas. After being knocked down twice earlier in the fight, Carbajal made an incredible comeback, knocking out Gonzalez in the 7th round.

programme.title: Montell Griffin vs James Toney 2
programme.desc: On December 6th, 1996 Montell Griffin and James Toney fought for a second time at the Lawlor Events Center in Reno for World Light Heavyweight titles resulting in an unanimous decision win for Griffin.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Ernie Terrell
programme.desc: On February 6th, 1967 Muhammad Ali fought Ernie Terrel at the Astrodome in Hourston, Tx. They fought for WBA and WBC World Heavyweight titles in a bout that went 15 rounds ending in a unanimous decision victory for Ali.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Oscar Natalio Bonavena
programme.desc: On December 7th, 1970 Muhammad Ali faced Oscar Natalio Bonavena in a 15 round bout with Bonavena going down three times in the last round forcing an automatic stoggage giving the win to Ali.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Curtis Strong
programme.desc: On February 6th, 1993 Oscar De La Hoya and Curtis Strong fought at the Sports Arena in San Diego, Ca. in a 6 round bout that lasted 4 rounds ending in a technical knockout victory for De La Hoya.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Felix Sturm
programme.desc: On June 5th, 2004 Oscar De La Hoya fought Felix Sturm at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for the WBO Middleweight title in a 12 round bout resulting in an unanimous decision win for De La Hoya.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Giorgio Campanella
programme.desc: On May 27th, 1994 Oscar De La hoya fought Giorgio Campanella at the MGM Grand Garden Arena in Las Vegas for the WBO World Super Featherweight title with De La Hoya knocking out Campanella in the thrid round securing his victory.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Hector Camacho
programme.desc: On September 13th, 1997 Oscar De La Hoya fought Hector Camacho for the WBC World Welterweight title at the Thomas and Mack Center in Las Vegas the twelve round bout ended in a unanimous decision victory for De La Hoya.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs John John Molina
programme.desc: On February 18th, 1995 Oscar De La Hoya fought John John Molina for the WBO World Lightweight title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a 12 round bout resulting in a win for De La Hoya.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Julio Cesar Chavez 1
programme.desc: On June 7th, 1996 Oscar De La Hoya and Julio Cesar Chavez fought for the first time for WBC World super Lightweight titles at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas that ended by technical knockout in the fourth round giving the win to De La Hoya.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Luis Ramon Campas
programme.desc: On May 3rd, 2003 Oscar De La Hoya faced Luis Ramon Campas for WBA and WBC World super welterweight title at the Mandalay Bay Resort in Las Vegas the ended by technical knockout in the 7th round with De La Hoya securing the victory.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Pernell Whitaker
programme.desc: On April 12th, 1997, Oscar De La Hoya fought Pernell Whitaker for the WBC Welterweight Title at Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas. De La Hoya won by a very controversial decision in a fight that many thought Whitaker had the superior performance.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Rafael Ruelas
programme.desc: On May 6th, 1995 Oscar De La Hoya fought Rafael Ruelas for IBF and WBO World Lightweight titles at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas. The 12 round bout only went two rounds ending in technical knockout favoring De La Hoya.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Ayub Kalule
programme.desc: On June 25th, 1981 Sugar Ray Leonard faced Ayub Kalule for the WBA World Super Welterweight title at the Astrodome in Houston that ended by technical knockout in the ninth round giving Leonard the win.

programme.title: Timothy Bradley Jr vs Kendall Holt
programme.desc: On April 4th, 2009, Timothy Bradley Jr fought Kendall Holt for the WBC and WBO Light Welterweight Titles at the Bell Centre in Montreal. Holt scored two knockdowns to keep the fight close, but Bradley stayed aggressive enough to earn the decision.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tonight's hour of power kicks off with 3 on 3 action. Fury will be teaming up with her mortal enemies—Siren the Voodoo Doll and Holidead to face Americana and Spring Break 24/7, Sandy Shore and Crystal Waters? This one should be a tidal wave of action!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: From the breaking of The Beast ankle, to the shocking attack in the parking lot, to the championship chase that resulted in thousands of LA Comic Con Fans witnessing the crowning of a new WOW World

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Princess Aussie finally gets her championship moment after the WOW World Championship belt is taken back from the thieving Lana Star. But not without a rematch against Penelope Pink - set for The Main Event. Will Aussie's reign end as soon as it's begun?

programme.desc: In the finale of the mind-bending match that’s part-duel, part-quiz show - one wrong answer could mean curtains for Yuya! Can he outduel and outthink a trivia whiz who’s never wrong?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Beyond Belief
programme.desc: Duelists throughout the city are continuously being attacked, and everyone is on the search to find out the who, how and why!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: A Date With Fate: Part 1
programme.desc: Yuya’s future takes a terrifying turn for the worse when he battles a fortunetelling foe who predicts this will be his last duel ever! Can Yuya fix his fate and avoid a devastating disaster, or has his luck finally run out?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: A Date With Fate: Part 2
programme.desc: As Yuya’s battle against the fortunetelling predictress Aura flares to its finish, it becomes crystal clear that Yuya’s danger-filled future is becoming a reality!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: For Our Tomorrows
programme.desc: Mysteries are revealed when the masked duelist who’s been terrorizing Leo Institute students is confronted and challenged to a battle royal!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Battle Between Buddies: Part 1
programme.desc: Yuya needs one more win to get into the Championship, but it will be his most difficult battle yet when he discovers he has to beat his best bud Gong in order to move on!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Battle Between Buddies: Part 2
programme.desc: The battle between best buds Yuya and Gong for a spot in the Arc League Championships rages to a friend-zied finish!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Challengers Assemble
programme.desc: Let the games begin! The top duelists from around the globe have gathered together for the Arc League Championships to find out who’s the best duelist in the world!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Something Fishy
programme.desc: Allie is looking to make a big splash at the Arc League Championship, but she soon finds herself in over her head! Can Allie’s deck of fishy friends turn the tides, or will her mysterious opponent sink her chances of winning?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Fusion Foes
programme.desc: Zuzu takes center stage in an epic rematch against Leo Institute’s dueling diamond, Julia Krystal! Will Zuzu avenge her earlier loss and walk away a winner, or will history repeat itself and leave Zuzu singing the blues?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Gong the Strong
programme.desc: When Gong’s old sparring partner sets a trap for Yuya, the only way Gong can save his friend is to forfeit his duel and get tossed from the tourney!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: The Pendulum Swings Both Ways: Part 1
programme.desc: Sylvio finally has just the thing to take Yuya down – a deck full of Pendulum Cards! Could Yuya's days in the spotlight be done for?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: The Pendulum Swings Both Ways: Part 2
programme.desc: Yuya is off his game and on the run as Sylvio zeroes in on zeroing out his life points! If Yuya can’t get into the swing of things, this could be his final performance!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Making the Cut: Part 1
programme.desc: Sora is psyched to put on a showstopping duel for the fans, but his opponent Shay is set to turn Sora’s one man show into a no man show!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Making the Cut: Part 2
programme.desc: Sora and Shay's heated duel hits its boiling point when dark secrets about their hidden history come to light! Could there be something sinister behind Sora’s sweet-toothed smile?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Sora’s Secrets: Part 1
programme.desc: While Yuto is looking for answers, Sora is looking to get some revenge! But when these two tangle, Yuya finds out more than he ever expected!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Sora’s Secrets: Part 2
programme.desc: Surprises are in the cards as the battle between Sora and Yuto comes to an unexpected conclusion! But just when Yuya thinks he’s seen everything, a new face shows up on the scene that makes Yuya do a triple take!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: A Dark Reflection
programme.desc: Yuya can’t believe his eyes when he finds himself standing face-to-face-to-face with two lookalikes who are out to destroy each other… and everything in sight!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Warped Dimensions
programme.desc: Yuya is in a coma, and nothing has been able to stir him from his terrifying state! Is Yuya down for the count, or will his duelmate’s ESP and TLC make him A-OK?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: A Duel Personality
programme.desc: It’s time for the second round of the Arc League Championship! Yuya is pitted against his polar opposite – a duelist who doesn't duel to entertain, but rather put his foes into pain!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Stealth Warriors
programme.desc: When a mysterious visitor threatens to throw the Championship into chaos, Declan moves in to uncover who they are and soon finds himself facing off against a merciless mercenary!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Bracing for Battle
programme.desc: Declan confronts Celina and shares a story from their past that reveals a frightening future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Battle Fields
programme.desc: It’s time for a nail biting battle royal in the ARC League Championship! With four battle zones to choose from, the action has never been more mesmerizing or the duels more dangerous!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: While Yuya is looking to knock the competition out cold in the Volcano Zone, the Iceberg Zone is heating up as Zuzu and Gong team up to defrost their foes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Danger Zones
programme.desc: As the battle royal rumbles on, Yuya finds himself caught in the crossfire when he stumbles across a battle between not-so-noble Knights!
